text.value: The signature format 'application/x-x509-ca-cert' is not checked (known formats: application/jose and application/pkcs7-signature)

The code provided (http://ihe.net/fhir/ValueSet/IHE.FormatCode.codesystem#urn:ihe:iti:xds:2017:mimeTypeSufficient) is not in the value set 'DocumentReference Format Code Set' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/formatcodes|4.0.1), and a code is recommended to come from this value set
The canonical URL http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.us.core points to the package hl7.fhir.us.core which is inconsistent with the stated packageId of hl7.fhir.us.core.v610

The packageId hl7.fhir.us.core.v610 points to the canonical http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/v610 which is inconsistent with the stated canonical of http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.us.core
The canonical URL http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.us.core points to the package hl7.fhir.us.core which is inconsistent with the stated packageId of hl7.fhir.us.core.3.1.1

The packageId hl7.fhir.us.core.3.1.1 points to the canonical http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/3.1.1 which is inconsistent with the stated canonical of http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.us.core
Pinned the version of http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/adjudication to 1.0.1 from choices of 0.1.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#3.1.0), 1.0.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#5.5.0), 1.0.1 (hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0)
Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBAdjudication to 2.1.0 from choices of 2.0.0 (hl7.fhir.us.carin-bb#2.0.0), 2.1.0 (hl7.fhir.us.carin-bb#2.1.0)

Wrong Display Name 'Coinsurance' for http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBAdjudication#coinsurance. Valid display is 'Co-insurance' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBAdjudication to 2.1.0 from choices of 2.0.0 (hl7.fhir.us.carin-bb#2.0.0), 2.1.0 (hl7.fhir.us.carin-bb#2.1.0)
Pinned the version of http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/data-absent-reason to 1.0.0 from choices of 0.1.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#3.1.0), 1.0.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0)
Pinned the version of http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/data-absent-reason to 1.0.0 from choices of 0.1.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#3.1.0), 1.0.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0)

Pinned the version of http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/CodeSystem/us-core-provenance-participant-type to 7.0.0 from choices of 3.1.1 (hl7.fhir.us.core#3.1.1), 6.1.0 (hl7.fhir.us.core#6.1.0), 7.0.0 (hl7.fhir.us.core#7.0.0)

Wrong Display Name 'Permit' for http://hl7.org/fhir/consent-provision-type#permit. Valid display is 'Opt In' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
